_description: Known source document requirements for corpus authority. RPMC is the first set. Add future source keys as needed. This is policy data, not code. Forge reads this at runtime.
_policy: A source is not registered because it is listed here. It is registered only when a local manifest row has filename/path evidence matching strong_filename_terms.
